title: Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates:
Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates!
